subject: Building self-awareness with the Emotion Mirror
previewText: Plus relive the Winter Games closing ceremony and join us for office hours.
module-2-0-0:
Help students connect with how they feel

From building self-awareness with the Emotion Mirror to celebrating our Winter Games champions, here is what is happening at SchoolAI.
module-4-0-0: Emotion Mirror: Building self-awareness through emotions
module-5-1-0: This Space guides students through honest, low-pressure reflection. They identify what they are feeling, connect emotions to their choices, and build the kind of self-awareness that lasts beyond the school day.
module-10-0-1: Winter Games closing ceremony
module-10-0-2: Two days ago, we wrapped the SchoolAI Winter Games Closing Ceremony, and it was something special. We crowned all six Winter Games Champions, showcased the Spaces they built for their students, and premiered the gold medal story videos that capture the real impact of their work. This was more than an awards show. It was proof of what happens when educators go all in for the kids in front of them.
module-12-0-0: Office hours with Tori Fitka
module-12-0-1: Got questions? Want to see something in action? Just want to connect with other educators doing the same work? Drop into SchoolAI Pilot Office Hours. Every week, Tori Fitka and the SchoolAI team are here for live support, quick demos, and real conversation. Stay for five minutes or the whole session. No registration needed.
